aboutHero.intro: Frontend developer with a solid background in Design. I create digital products that combine code precision with aesthetic sensibility, delivering exceptional experiences from concept to production.

about.title: About Me
about.text1: Creative Frontend Developer with over 5 years of experience in Design, now focused on software engineering. Specialized in React, TypeScript, and modern frontend architectures.
about.text2: My journey combines creative vision with technical thinking, allowing me to develop interfaces that not only visually delight but are also performant, accessible, and scalable.
about.text3: Experience building complete products: from Design Systems and Figma prototyping to implementation with React, Supabase integration, and production deployment. Focus on clean code, componentization, and best practices.
about.quote: I believe exceptional code goes beyond functionality—it must be elegant, maintainable, and create experiences that delight users.

footer.description: Creative Frontend Developer & UI/UX Designer. Building scalable digital products with the precision of code and the soul of design.

items.quote: Paula built our analytics dashboard from scratch with React and TypeScript. The code is clean, well-documented, and the performance is exceptional. Her attention to UI details made all the difference.
items.author: Rafael Mendes

items.quote: We hired Paula to refactor our legacy frontend. She implemented a consistent Design System, componentized the entire application, and reduced our bundle by 40%. Complete professional.
items.author: Juliana Costa

items.quote: Paula delivered a full-stack application using React and Supabase in record time. The AI integration for report generation exceeded our expectations. Highly recommend!
items.author: André Ferreira

website.challenge: The client needed a professional digital presence that reflected their expertise in family consulting, with an integrated booking system and automated lead capture. The challenge was to create a complete solution with instant loading and impeccable technical SEO.
website.solution: I developed a performant web platform using React, ensuring maximum score on Lighthouse. The architecture integrates a blog for content marketing, asynchronous booking, and complete sales funnel automation.

portfolio.challenge: To create a portfolio that wasn't just a static gallery, but living proof of my technical skills. The goal was to build a complete React application that demonstrated mastery over global states, complex animations, and rigorous typing.
portfolio.solution: I developed this site from scratch using React and TypeScript. The interface uses Tailwind for efficient styling and Framer Motion to orchestrate entrance animations and micro-interactions, creating a fluid and modern experience without compromising performance.

microsaas.challenge: Traditional distance learning suffers from high dropout rates and low engagement. Conventional platforms fail to maintain long-term student interest, especially in specific cultural niches like Umbanda studies.
microsaas.solution: I developed a Gamified LMS (Learning Management System). The platform uses level progression, achievements, and visual rewards to keep students engaged. The architecture supports video streaming and interactive real-time quizzes.

dashboard.challenge: Health insurance providers accumulate massive but scattered data. Managers struggle to visualize engagement KPIs and operational results in real-time, hindering strategic decision-making.
dashboard.solution: I created a centralized Executive Dashboard. The tool processes complex data and presents it through intuitive visualizations (DataViz), allowing managers to monitor portfolio health and ROI of engagement actions on a single screen.

platform.challenge: Beauty professionals lose up to 10 hours weekly on manual management. WhatsApp scheduling, paper contracts, and lack of financial control hinder growth. The challenge was to create an 'All-in-One' platform that was powerful yet had a minimalist, luxurious aesthetic ('Industrial Noir') to appeal to this demanding audience.
platform.solution: Built KONTROL, a complete ecosystem. Used React + Vite for instant performance and Supabase for a scalable serverless backend. The 'Industrial Noir' interface isn't just style; it's a custom Design System focused on reducing cognitive load. Features include auto-generated PDF contracts, drag-and-drop calendar, and real-time financial dashboards.
